title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at CL Educate - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at CL Educate - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
CL Educate invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CL Educate:
CL Educate is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CL Educate!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
